Serial Murder Case
The film crew is
Oh, good, you're still here.
Uh.
Hmm, seeing it up close is quite impressive.
Hey,
Thanks for earlier.
Gloria has already gone home.
It's not like I came to see her or anything.
Ah, I was just intruding, wasn't I?
No, you came at just the right time. I'm a bit at loose ends right now. Mind keeping me company for a bit?
The film crew is still here.
Yo, I've been waiting for you.

It looks like the film crew is shooting the scenery at Central Park.
Is everyone around here just extras?
This place can be called a spot for New Yorkers to relax, yet it forms an extraordinary world all on its own.
I can't see any of the main actors.
The director seems a bit tired. Could it be filming fatigue?
He has the same gentle smile that he had at the party. It must be pretty scary when such a person gets angry.
Talking to such a celebrity like this feels strangely surreal.
Have you gone to see Meryl?
No, not yet.
I see. When you go to her, could you please tell her to come to filming properly?
Got it. I’ll make sure to pass it on.
I appreciate it.
I’m sorry for imposing various things on you.
Is there no role for the actors today?
No, that’s...
The fickle queen hasn’t made her appearance.
Fickle queen?
What do you mean by fickle queen?
Ah, I’m talking about Meryl. Even though there’s filming today, there’s no sign of her at all.
I wonder what’s going on.
Even when I contacted her, there’s been no word.
This is troubling.
Is this something that happens because the director isn't skilled enough?
I’m sorry for even asking about Cindy.
No, thank you very much. Ever since you invited me to the party, work has gotten busier.
I really appreciate it.
I’d be happy if you meant that sincerely, but was it really a bother?
No, really.
There’s no way it was a bother.
Huh.
Well, that’s good then.
Are you alone right now?
Yeah. I'm shooting the scenery of Central Park right now.
I just can’t help but want to be there no matter what.
That's exactly why you can produce such amazing films.
Well, I was probably just lucky up until now.
I want to go somewhere warm and just relax.
Have you found Cindy?
No way.
There's no way she'd be found that easily.
That's true.
That's why I trusted you with it, but if you keep this up, it'll be a problem.
But I wonder why that serious girl just up and disappeared.
Could she be held captive by an obsessive fan?
Ugh.
I hope it’s not that kind of situation.
But from Gloria's reaction, it doesn’t seem like that’s the case.
Gloria, huh?
I can't really understand her.
Anyway, please don't forget to find Cindy. What if she gets involved in some accident?
Or worse, what if a killer got her?
Please don’t say such ominous things.
Yeah, you're right.
Let me know if you find out anything. I’ll probably be around here for a while.
Was Meryl shooting today?
Yeah, she is. She's been throwing a fit this time.
Seems like there's a lot going on.
By the way, what kind of request did you get?
Nope, that’s a secret.
Phew.
Hmm, you’re not feeling down because of that, are you?
It seems you’ve won Meryl over, so I’m sorry, but could you contact her for me?
Well, that...
Actually, I haven't asked for her contact.
That's ridiculous, and you accepted the request?
Ugh.
Yeah, I can say it sounds like Meryl. She's the kind of woman who thinks everyone knows her business without her saying anything.
She's renting a suite at the St. Regis Hotel. Sorry, but I need you to check it out directly.
Got it. The suite at St. Regis.
I'm really sorry for you. I'll definitely pay this debt back someday.
Please take care of Meryl.
I'm also curious about Meryl's relationship with the director.
I don't mind being someone to talk to at all,
but I can't stay too long.
The director seems pretty bored all alone.
I have to find Cindy before it's too late.
Cindy...
has become a victim.
That can't be true, right?
I don't think it's a kidnapping situation.
However, Gloria looks like she's hiding something.
No, Gloria wouldn’t tell everything she knows.
Could it be that she's eloping with Guy?
Meryl not coming to the shoot, huh?
Could it be that she's upset, waiting for my call?
I didn't feel that during the party, but she must be a difficult person.
The request hasn't progressed at all, and thinking about her is a bit gloomy.
I'm hesitant to meet her without knowing anything yet, but since the director asked, I have to go.
※※※ It's a bug ※※※
Ｖ＝
